name: proxy-smart
description: Administer a SMART on FHIR authorization proxy from Codex. Bundles the proxy-smart admin skill + the hosted proxy-smart MCP server (api.proxy-smart.com) so Codex can manage SMART apps, client scopes, and healthcare users, read FHIR, and search the platform docs — all through the proxy's audited admin API. Sign in on first use; the admin role is required for changes.

interface.displayName: Proxy Smart — SMART on FHIR Admin
interface.shortDescription: Administer a SMART on FHIR proxy from your AI.
interface.longDescription: Manage SMART apps, Keycloak client scopes, and healthcare users, read FHIR resources, and search the platform documentation via the hosted proxy-smart MCP server. Every action runs through the proxy's audited admin API. Sign in on first use; the admin role is required for changes.
